original_image_tags: Hand-drawn side-profile sketch of a swept-wing jet aircraft. The nose is on the left, tail on the right. The drawing is annotated with multiple arrows pointing to specific features.
Hand-drawn sketch of an octagonal paving stone or brick, shown from above.

elements.description: A hand-drawn sketch of an aircraft in profile view. The drawing includes labels pointing to various features: 'COCKPIT SET FORWARD', 'CANVAS COVERED', 'SWAYBACK APPEARANCE HERE', 'NOSE WHEEL', 'JET ENGINES CANVAS COVERED ON WINGS', 'SEVERE SWEEP TO MID-WING', 'SILVER (NOT GLASS) BULGE', and 'LOW SET TAIL PLANE'. The aircraft has a distinct shape with a swept-back wing and a prominent nose.
A small, separate sketch depicting an octagonal shape, labeled 'DESIGN OF BRICK ON RAMP AT AIRFIELD - ASPHALT SEAMS'. It appears to be a detail of a paving pattern.
